text: American Express Company operates through three distinct business segments: Global Consumer Services Group, Global Commercial Services, and Global Merchant and Network Services. The company provides charge and credit payment card products, travel-related services, merchant acquisition and processing, servicing and settlement, point-of-sale marketing, and fraud prevention services worldwide. American Express serves consumers, small businesses, mid-sized companies, and large corporations through multiple distribution channels including mobile and online applications, third-party vendors, direct mail, telephone, and in-house sales teams. The company employs approximately 75,100 full-time employees and is led by CEO Stephen Joseph Squeri, with headquarters in New York, New York.
